title: Hosting Request Routing and Site Config
interaction_flow: Client → puterSiteMiddleware: HTTP request (req, res, next)
puterSiteMiddleware → puterSiteMiddleware: check isSubdomain (hostname ends with staticHostingDomain / privateAppHostingDomain) OR req.is_custom_domain
puterSiteMiddleware → runInternal: await runInternal(req, res, next) [inside Context if needed]
runInternal → getUsernameSite(): check subdomain ends with '.at' → filesystemService.node(NodePathSelector) to find Public/index.html
runInternal → PuterSiteService: get_subdomain(subdomain, {is_custom_domain}) [if not username site]
runInternal: site === null → res.status(404).send('Subdomain not found') [STOP]
runInternal → resolvePrivateAppForHostedSite({req, site, services, associatedApp}) → privateApp
resolvePrivateAppForHostedSite → DatabaseService: SELECT * FROM apps WHERE owner_user_id=? AND is_private=1 AND index_url IN (...)
buildPrivateHostRedirectUrl → build URL: protocol://subdomain.privateHostingDomain + originalUrl → redirectUrl
runInternal: no redirect possible → res.status(403).send('Private app host mismatch') [STOP]
runInternal → AclService: check(subdomainActor, rootNode, 'read') → permission check
runInternal: privateAccessGateEnabled && privateAppEnabled → evaluatePrivateAppAccess({req, res, services, app, requestPath})
evaluatePrivateAppAccess: no identity → respondPrivateLoginBootstrap({res, app}) → 200 HTML login page [STOP]
runInternal: !targetNode.exists() → respond404({path}, req, res, next, subdomainRootPath)
parseSiteErrorConfig → parseJsonConfig(text): tries parseCloudfrontRules, parseKeyedRules, parseVercelRules
parseSiteErrorConfig → parseNginxStyleConfig(text) [fallback if JSON parse fails]
runInternal: site.protected → getSiteActorFromToken() or makeSiteActorFromAppToken() → aclConfig
runInternal → LLRead.run({no_acl, actor, fsNode:targetNode, range?}) → stream

key_functions.puterSiteMiddleware(req, res, next): Entry point. Guards on isSubdomain || is_custom_domain. Wraps runInternal in Context if needed.
key_functions.runInternal(req, res, next): Main orchestrator: resolves subdomain → site → owner → privateApp → access check → filesystem read
key_functions.getSubdomainFromHostedRequest(req): Strips private hosting domain suffix to extract subdomain label
key_functions.hostMatchesPrivateDomain(hostname): Returns true if hostname is/ends-with any privateAppHostingDomain
key_functions.resolvePrivateAppForHostedSite({req,site: If no associatedApp, queries DB for private app by index_url candidates
key_functions.buildPrivateAppIndexUrlCandidates(req): Generates candidate index URLs across all hosting domains (static + private, alt variants)
key_functions.evaluatePrivateAppAccess({req,res,servic: Resolves identity via cookie/session/bootstrap, emits access check event, issues private cookie if allowed
key_functions.resolvePrivateIdentity({req,services,app: Tries private-cookie → session-cookie → bootstrap-token; returns identity {userUid, sessionUuid, source}
key_functions.evaluatePublicHostedActorContext({req,re: Sets req.actor for public hosted sites; issues publicHostedActorToken cookie
key_functions.getSiteErrorConfig(req, subdomainRootPat: Reads .puter_site_config file (max 256KB), parses via parseSiteErrorConfig, caches on req
key_functions.parseSiteErrorConfig(text): Tries JSON parse first (Cloudfront / Vercel / keyed rules), falls back to nginx-style error_page directives
key_functions.parseVercelRules(config, value): Parses rewrites/routes array: catch-all source patterns → maps to config.exactRules['404']
key_functions.parseKeyedRules(config, object): Parses object with keys matching status codes, 4xx/5xx classes, or 'default'
key_functions.maybeRespondWithSiteConfig({...}): Reads config, finds matching rule, serves rule.file or status-only response
key_functions.respond404(...): Checks site config for 404 rule → falls back to /404.html → respondHtmlError
key_functions.respondPrivateLoginBootstrap({res,app}): Returns 200 HTML page with Puter.js sign-in flow for unauthenticated private app requests

config_structure.createEmptyConfig: { exactRules: Object, classRules: Object, defaultRule: null }

key_relationships: runInternal depends_on AclService (permission check on root dir)
runInternal depends_on AuthService (token verification, cookie creation)
runInternal calls evaluatePrivateAppAccess for private apps
runInternal calls evaluatePublicHostedActorContext for public apps
runInternal uses LLRead for file streaming
important_notes: Private redirect: if app.is_private && !hostMatchesPrivateDomain → redirect to privateAppHostingDomain subdomain URL
Config file: .puter_site_config at site root, max 256KB, cached per request per root path
Bootstrap login page served as 200 HTML (not 401) to avoid browser credential dialogs
Public hosted actor cookie minted after successful session/bootstrap auth for future requests
Username sites (*.at): resolved via /username/Public/index.html presence check, no DB lookup
ACL bypassed (no_acl:true) for file serving unless site.protected=true
